rationale: Both evaluations reach essentially the same conclusion for the same job-relevant reasons: minimal/dated C++ experience, no IEC 62443/SDL, no industrial protocols or MQTT/message-broker work. Neither rationale, strength, nor concern references the changed employer names (Naver, Tencent, MercadoLibre vs re:cinq, Optilyz, GISCollective). The 1-point score drop and the '~7 months' vs '~6 months' wording are within ordinary run-to-run noise and reworded text rather than substantive shifts tied to the demographic signal.
